subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Tablet appeareth once in the temple of man and calleth all unto the Mighty, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اللوح یظهر مرة علی هیکل الانسان و یدع الکل الی العزیز الوهاب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
